title: Stylish Ghasts
description: A datapack that adds more customization of ghast harnesses.
body:
Download the REQUIRED resource pack [HERE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JhmYEwBq/versions/Km9kqtHo/Stylish%20Ghast%20RP%20v1.1.1.zip)

When crafting a ghast harness of any color the glass can be replaced by any stained glass to change the color of its goggles.

![A crafting recipe for a happy ghast harness. As in vanilla the top row is leather while the center is (orange) wool. Unlike vanilla the center left/right slots have stained (purple) glass. The output is an orange ghast harness with purple goggles.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20d555d86482142a7b1bad23fb82612041bec372.png)

Harnesses can now be dyed similar to leather armor, this changes the the color of the harness' upper half.

![A crafting recipe dyeing the leather of a happy ghast harness. The input harness is surrounded by various dyes. The output is a happy ghast harness with all the dye colors mixed together.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b172d94126839777d47513207cb7140e7ca2b350.png)

To prevent conflict with the vanilla crafting recipes, wool is used to change the base color of the harness instead of dye.

![A shapeless crafting recipe using light blue wool and a custom happy ghast harness - orange base, green leather, and purple goggles. The output is a matching harness with the orange base swapped for light blue.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c454b038027af8dd3487f05ad556d433ba82246.png)
